fields.label: Lease
fields.description: Lease record associated with the reminder event.

fields.label: Renewal Request
fields.description: Optional renewal request linked to the reminder.

fields.label: Policy
fields.description: Reminder policy that generated the log entry.

fields.label: Renewal Cycle
fields.description: Renewal cycle identifier used to group reminders.

fields.label: Threshold (Days)
fields.description: Days before expiry that triggered the reminder.

fields.label: Threshold Key
fields.description: Internal key for the reminder threshold rule.

fields.label: Scheduled Date
fields.description: Date the reminder was scheduled to be delivered.

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Delivery channel used for the reminder.

fields.label: Recipient
fields.description: Display value for the reminder recipient.

fields.label: Recipient User
fields.description: User record that received the system notification, if applicable.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Current delivery outcome for the reminder.

fields.label: Sent At
fields.description: Timestamp when the reminder was successfully sent.

fields.label: Retry Count
fields.description: Number of retry attempts made after a failed delivery.

fields.label: Message ID
fields.description: External message or notification identifier returned by the delivery service.

fields.label: Error Summary
fields.description: Short error message captured when delivery fails.

fields.label: Deduplication Key
fields.description: Hidden key used to prevent duplicate reminder records.
